pain_points: Multi-tenant performance isolation challenges - noisy neighbor problems require manual log analysis to identify
Slow feedback loops on product releases - 4-6 weeks to understand feature impact prevents rapid iteration
Fragmented product usage visibility across disparate data sources (Google Analytics, Application Insights, Snowflake, Salesforce) requiring 2-3 days of manual data extraction
Disconnected user experience and technical performance - cannot correlate customer complaints with actual performance data
No early warning system for customer health - at-risk accounts identified only 30-60 days before renewal, costing $8-12M annually in preventable churn
use_cases: API Partner Ecosystem Health Monitoring - ensure third-party integrations operate reliably, maintain partner satisfaction, identify issues before they escalate to partner churn

Multi-Tenant Performance Monitoring & SLA Management - ensure fair resource allocation across 850+ tenants, detect noisy neighbor situations, guarantee SLA compliance (P95 API latency <500ms, 99.9% uptime)
Proactive Customer Health Monitoring & Churn Prevention - identify at-risk customers 60-90 days before renewal using data-driven health scoring, reducing annual churn from 12% to <8%
A/B Testing & Product Experimentation Platform - enable rapid experimentation by measuring feature variant performance against business KPIs, making go/no-go decisions within days of launch
Real-Time Feature Adoption Analysis & Funnel Optimization - track granular feature usage patterns and workflow conversion rates, reducing feedback loops from 4-6 weeks to 3-7 days
customer_context.scale: 850+ enterprise customer accounts, 125,000+ daily active users, 45M+ brand assets, 8.5M+ daily API requests, multi-region AWS deployment (US-East, US-West, EU-West, APAC), 15-person product team, 60-person engineering organization, 40+ technology partner integrations
metrics: customer.health_score - 0-100 composite score from weighted usage signals
tenant.sla.availability_pct - successful requests / total requests * 100 per tenant
feature.adoption_rate - users who used feature in last 30 days / total active users * 100
api.success_rate_pct - 2xx responses / total requests * 100 per partner
experiment.uplift_pct - variant vs control performance improvement
